name: @sextant/conv-workflow
description: The workflow convention in TypeScript — a co-equal peer to conventions/workflow/go (ADR-0041, ADR-0048). Record types + parse/marshal helpers for the run/v1 contract (run/template/event/control), plus the run.start verb.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/test/records.test.js dist/test/conformance.test.js
